Internship - Assistant Engineer at FL Immo
Explore my academic background — from engineering studies and Erasmus experiences to my professional journey and achievements
Internship — Assistant Engineer at FL Immo
During my internship at FL Immo, I developed a web application to manage condominiums and visit reports. This improved efficiency, clarity, and collaboration for property managers and stakeholders.
Built a web app to streamline condominium management and visit reports, improving workflows for property managers.

At UTBM (Université de Technologie de Belfort‑Montbéliard), I strengthened my engineering fundamentals across low‑level C/C++ programming, networking, databases, and modern web development. Projects included STM32 embedded programming, a JavaFX game based on Turing Machine, and building a learning platform inspired by Moodle — all with a strong focus on teamwork, testing, and documentation.
Started my Computer Science Engineering curriculum at UTBM, focusing on embedded systems, networks, web engineering and software design.

I spent a semester at MTU in Cork, Ireland, where I deepened my software engineering skills and collaborated in an international environment. Courses covered open‑source workflows, statistics with R, Java OOP, and low‑level C. This experience strengthened adaptability, communication, and teamwork.
Exchange semester at Munster Technological University. Studied OSS development, statistics with R, OOP in Java, and low‑level C while improving English.
BUT in Computer Science — IUT Robert Schuman

I graduated with a BUT in Computer Science, developing solid skills across software engineering, algorithms, databases, and networks. The program combined theory with hands‑on projects in C, Java, Python, web development, and data modeling, preparing me for both professional work and further engineering studies.
Completed a three‑year Bachelor of Technology (BUT Informatique) with strong foundations in programming, math, networks, and databases.

I completed my high school studies at Lycée Gustave Courbet in Belfort, France, earning a Scientific Baccalauréat with honors. This period built my foundations in mathematics and science, and strengthened discipline through competitive fencing — values I carried into engineering studies.
Graduated with a Scientific Baccalauréat (with honors) at Lycée Gustave Courbet in Belfort, France.
